description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 11th; Weight 5 lbs.; Price 35,312 gp DESCRIPTION This massive +1 ghost touch disrupting warhammer is crafted from a single piece of metal. It surface has no blemishes or distinguishing marks, and its haft is wrapped in dry, leathery, ancient skin. Three times per day as a free action, when used to strike an undead creature, that creature must succeed at a DC 20 Fortitude save or be knocked prone. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells heal, plane shift; Cost 17,812 gp
